tasks.subject: Task 1: CI Workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests and builds a debug APK on every push and pull request to `main`.

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Workflow triggers on `push` to `main` and `pull_request` targeting `main`
- [ ] Uses JDK 21 (temurin distribution)
- [ ] Gradle cache configured with hash key
- [ ] Runs `./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] Runs `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml,sys; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')) or sys.exit(1); print('VALID')"` → `VALID`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml,sys; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')) or sys.exit(1); print('VALID')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Workflow triggers on push to main and pull_request targeting main", "Uses JDK 21 (temurin distribution)", "Gradle cache configured with hash key", "Runs ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest", "Runs ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Gradle Signing Config + Publish Workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a conditional release signing config to Gradle (reads env vars, falls back to debug signing locally) and create the Play Store publish workflow triggered on version tags.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/build.gradle.kts`
- Create: `.github/workflows/publish.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `signingConfigs.release` reads `SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS`, `SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD`, `SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD` from env
- [ ] `release` buildType uses `signingConfigs.release` when env var is set, else falls back to `debug`
- [ ] `assembleRelease` succeeds locally (unsigned/debug-signed, no env vars needed)
- [ ] `publish.yml` triggers on tags matching `v*.*.*`
- [ ] `publish.yml` decodes keystore from `secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64`, builds AAB, uploads to `production` track, cleans up keystore with `if: always()`

**Verify:** `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/build.gradle.kts", ".github/workflows/publish.yml"], "verifyCommand": "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease", "acceptanceCriteria": ["signingConfigs.release reads SIGNING_KEY_ALIAS, SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD, SIGNING_STORE_PASSWORD from env", "release buildType uses signingConfigs.release when env var is set, else falls back to debug", "assembleRelease succeeds locally", "publish.yml triggers on tags matching v*.*.*", "publish.yml decodes keystore, builds AAB, uploads to production track, cleans up keystore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a comprehensive README.md presenting the project, features, build instructions, and CI/CD secrets table.

**Files:**
- Create: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CI badge and MIT badge present
- [ ] Features list covers quality selection, progress bar, history, configurable Cobalt URL
- [ ] Build instructions use `./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] Secrets table lists all 5 required secrets with generation instructions
- [ ] Links to CONTRIBUTING.md and LICENSE
- [ ] `grep -c "^##" README.md` returns 6

**Verify:** `grep -c "^##" README.md` → `6`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c \"^##\" README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI badge and MIT badge present", "Features list covers quality selection, progress bar, history, configurable Cobalt URL", "Build instructions use ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest", "Secrets table lists all 5 required secrets with generation instructions", "Links to CONTRIBUTING.md and LICENSE", "grep -c '^##' README.md returns 6"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: LICENSE + CONTRIBUTING + Final Commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add MIT license file and contributor guide, then commit all new files in a single commit.

**Files:**
- Create: `LICENSE`
- Create: `CONTRIBUTING.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] LICENSE contains standard MIT text with year 2026 and name Cyrille Sondag
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md covers prerequisites, setup verification, commit conventions, PR process, and architecture overview
- [ ] All 6 new/modified files committed successfully
- [ ] `git log --oneline -1` shows "chore: add GitHub project files"

**Verify:** `git log --oneline -1` → commit message contains "chore: add GitHub project files"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["LICENSE", "CONTRIBUTING.md"], "verifyCommand": "git log --oneline -1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LICENSE contains standard MIT text with year 2026 and name Cyrille Sondag", "CONTRIBUTING.md covers prerequisites, setup verification, commit conventions, PR process, and architecture overview", "All 6 new/modified files committed successfully"]}
```
